title: January 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 25''' is the 25th day of the year. There are 340 days remaining (341 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 32|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 32]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 136|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 136]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Jordan Stephens]] is born.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 1|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 1]] published.
*2006 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']] published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 123|''Star Wars Insider'' 123]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 27|''Star Wars'' (2015) 27]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle (trade paperback)|''Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle'' trade paperback]] published.
*2022 – [[Star Wars Insider 208|''Star Wars Insider'' 208]] published.
*2022 – ''[[Queen's Hope]]'' published in Germany.
*[[2023]] – "[[Entombed]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 28|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 28]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic — The Blade 2|''The High Republic — The Blade'' 2]] published.
*2023 – [[Yoda 3|''Yoda'' 3]] published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Visions: The Manga Anthology]]'' published in Japan.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian: The Manga, Vol. 1|''The Mandalorian: The Manga'', Vol. 1]] published in Japan.
